holdings.infoBox: EUFN is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 9.39%, Banco Santander at 5.59%, Allianz SE at 5.12%, UBS Group AG at 4.65%, and Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 3.96%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Europe Financials ETF (EUFN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Europe / Financials index, a market-cap-weighted index of financials stocks in developed European markets. EUFN was launched on Jan 20, 2010 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Europe's chemical makers catch a break as Iran war hits Asian rivals
data.text: Europe's embattled chemicals ​industry is getting an unexpected lift from the Iran war, as supply disruptions raise costs ‌for Asian rivals and customers prioritise reliability over price.

data.title: German Stocks Have Been Flying. What to Do Now.
data.text: A continent-wide defense bump, didn't exactly catch the market by surprise, but markets could keep running.

data.title: ECB Rate Cut Boosts European Stocks and These Europe-Focused ETFs in the US
data.text: The European Central Bank (ECB) cut its benchmark interest rate Thursday for the first time in five years, boosting European stocks and many Europe-focused exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in the U.S.

data.title: European Banks Suddenly Look Good Amid U.S. Rescues
data.text: With the exception of Credit Suisse, there have been no failures in Europe. And with interest rates rising and tight regulation, investors have been drawn to banks like ING, BBVA, and Lloyds.
